rationale: The assistant explicitly brakes the N+1 local repair by saying not to scatter definitions, update boxes, field tables, and chart footnotes into four separate explanation systems. It moves upstream to the underlying IA/source-of-truth issue:口径不可见且不一致, and proposes a consolidated口径说明/字段释义 structure synchronized across page and export. Although it still includes a chart-level calculation note, it is framed as part of a unified structure rather than directly adding another isolated field.
